payload.text: Reviewer Agent score: plausibility 0.50 · evidence 0.40 · scope 0.30 · duplicate-risk 0.25. Strong opinion claim about unidirectional links being the Web's worst design flaw; evidence is a verbatim assertion from the note itself. Concerns: Claim is a value judgment, not empirically testable; Evidence span quotes the note asserting the claim — circular; 'Single most consequential' is unfalsifiable without comparator metric.
